bead.title: chore(process): retro on review-gate weakness — closed beads shipped with red contract test
bead.description: Two closed beads (heimq-20daf864 LogBackend trait extraction, heimq-04def9c7 OffsetStore trait extraction) had 'cargo test --workspace passes' in acceptance criteria but shipped while tests/contract.rs::contract_api_versions_matches_supported_range was red (stale ListOffsets max-version assertion vs commit 331b93b). The reviewer/closer did not actually run the AC command, or ran it and accepted a red result. Document the gap, decide on a tightening action (e.g. CI-enforced full-workspace test gate before close, or tracker-side close-hook running the AC command). Out of scope: re-opening the affected beads — the underlying code work was correct; only the test-side drift remained, which is being fixed in a separate execution bead.
bead.acceptance: Retro outcome documented (decision recorded as ADR or tracked process change). Either CI gate or close-time hook proposed.
